sentences.arabic: الْأَمْثَالُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ كَلِمَاتٌ قَصِيرَةٌ تَحْمِلُ حِكْمَةً عَمِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Arapske poslovice su kratke riječi koje nose duboku mudrost.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic proverbs are short phrases that carry deep wisdom.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُهَا النَّاسُ فِي الْحَدِيثِ الْيَوْمِيِّ لِلتَّعْبِيرِ عَنْ أَفْكَارِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi ih koriste u svakodnevnom razgovoru da izraze svoje misli.
sentences.translationEn: People use them in everyday conversation to express their thoughts.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ أَشْهَرِ الْأَمْثَالِ: «الصَّبْرُ مِفْتَاحُ الْفَرَجِ» وَ«الْعِلْمُ نُورٌ».
sentences.translation: Među najpoznatijim poslovicama su: «Strpljenje je ključ olakšanja» i «Znanje je svjetlo».
sentences.translationEn: Among the most famous are: 'Patience is the key to relief' and 'Knowledge is light.'

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَقِلُ هَذِهِ الْأَمْثَالُ مِنَ الْآبَاءِ إِلَى الْأَبْنَاءِ عَبْرَ الْأَجْيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ove poslovice prenose se s roditelja na djecu kroz generacije.
sentences.translationEn: These proverbs are passed down from parents to children across generations.
